Mod.name: Blank Stone
Mod.description:
[h1]BlankStone: A Journey to the Magnum Opus[/h1]

This mod allows you to [b]purify and infuse elemental stones[/b] to maximize the alchemical potential of Noita liquids. Discover all the secrets scattered around the world, decipher the hints, and achieve the [b]Magnum Opus[/b].

[hr]

[h2]Content[/h2]
[list]
[*] 1 new spell
[*] 1 new item in the item pool
[*] 2 new crafting systems
[*] Many new elemental stones, unlocked through these crafting systems
[/list]

[hr]

[h2]A message appears before you...[/h2]
[quote]
Hey! Thanks for playing BlankStone.

The mod is still in [b]Alpha version[/b], so expect many changes (mainly in the endgame content).

Hope you'll have as much fun discovering the mod as I had creating it.

[i]— Ked[/i]

[i]PS: Feel free to contact me if you have any suggestions![/i]
[/quote]
